question: Show the names of conductors that have conducted more than one orchestras.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM conductor AS T1 JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID  =  T2.Conductor_ID GROUP BY T2.Conductor_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_3 GROUP BY T1.col_1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_3 GROUP BY T1.col_1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
